arts.ttl: Lille vs Real Madrid, 2024 Champions League: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Lille in what will be the first away game of the 2024-25 edition of the Champions League for Los Blancos. Real Madrid predicted XI: Lunin, Carvajal, Tchouameni, Rudiger, Mendy, Camavinga, Valverde, Bellingham, Güler, Rodrygo, Vinicius.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Lille
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe, who missed Sunday's draw, has travelled to France with the rest of the Madrid squad, and here's the team Ancelotti could pick on Wednesday night. Ancelotti will get another chance to assess the progress of his squad on Wednesday as Madrid take on Lille away from home in their second league phase encounter.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid possible starting XI against Lille in the UEFA Champions League
arts.sum: The most probable starting XI for Real Madrid at the Pierre Mauroy Stadium is: Lunin; Carvajal, Tchouaméni or Militão, Rüdiger, Mendy; Valverde, Camavinga, Bellingham; Güler; Rodrygo, and Vinicius. Will Mbappé play for Real Madrid against Lille?

arts.ttl: Not Arsenal! 'Florian Wirtz will sign for Real Madrid'
